name: Playback Trauma®: The Dog
short_description: Your dog Marla got lost in the most terrifying forest in New Jersey while on a walk, and now it's up to you to find her. Search the area, clean up Marla's poop, and avoid the creatures that may be lurking in the darkness.
detailed_description:
Look for your lost dog in one of the scariest locations in New Jersey and see everything from the perspective of a hyper-realistic bodycam. The game is a short ~15 minute experience intended to be completed in one sitting.

Features:

- Primarily a "Walking simulator" with a focus on exploration and story.

- A photorealistic interpretation of the New Jersey Pine Barrens created with Unreal 5 and seen through the lens of your bodycam.

- Brave the horrors of the forest without reaching your wits end. Marla is counting on you!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
